synopsis:
Doctor Aphra: Chaos Agent is a trade paperback collecting the first ten issues from Marvel Comics Doctor Aphra (2025) Series
A bold new start to Doctor Aphra’s adventures in the wake of Return of the Jedi!
AFinally out from Darth Vader’s shadow, the opportunities are limitless for everybody’s favorite rogue archaeologist, Doctor Aphra — newest agent of the New Republic?! Is Aphra’s heart truly in her new status quo? Find out as she teams up with legendary rebels, beginning with her old pal Luke Skywalker on a quest to track down a rare artifact! But an unstable underworld collector has a different plan. Can Aphra truly be trusted, or will she betray her Jedi friend for a chance at the prize? Then Aphra teams with Han Solo on a mission to return a prized piece of art to a gangster from the smuggler’s past! And when she and Chewbacca are tasked with providing security for a vital diplomatic mission on a remote desert kingdom, a mystery saboteur with a connection to Aphra threatens to upend the whole event
Collecting:
Doctor Aphra: Chaos Agent (2025) #1-10
title: Doctor Aphra (2025): Chaos Agent
